title: Reconciliation Workflow for Finance Managers
thesis: A subscription product focused on reconciliation could win with finance managers by reducing messy reconciliation under conditions shaped by volume growth.

title: Invoice Exception Handling for Finance Managers
thesis: A subscription product focused on invoice exception handling could win with finance managers by reducing manual review under conditions shaped by lean finance teams.

title: Invoice Exception Handling for Fractional CFOs
thesis: A subscription product focused on invoice exception handling could win with fractional CFOs by reducing invoice errors under conditions shaped by lean finance teams.
